text:
effective 10/01/2023
628 Z0100A_MDCR_HIPPS_TXT Z0100A_MDCR_HIPPS_TXT Z0100A Medicare Part A HIPPS Code Text CHAR 7 The data in this column contains the submitted Medicare Part A HIPPS code (RUG group followed by assessment type indicator).
629 Z0100B_MDCR_RUG_VRSN_TXT Z0100B_MDCR_RUG_VRSN_TXT Z0100B Medicare Part A RUG Version Text CHAR 10 The data in this column contains the submitted Medicare Part A RUG version code.
630 Z0100C_MDCR_SHRT_STAY_CD Z0100C_MDCR_SHRT_STAY_CD Z0100C Medicare Part A
